label: 关键点布局求解
description: 为 keypoint 层级树的每个节点求解一个 2D 位置（单位米）：把面积、clearance 净距离、方位（orientation）关系建模为可微能量项，叠加「父节点=子节点面积加权平均」「圆盘非重叠」「整体紧凑」正则，用确定性 Adam 梯度下降最小化总能量。输出与输入结构一致、但每个节点附带 position {x,y} 的 keypoint 字典，可直接接入 关键点关系图(keypoint_graph) 按真实点位绘制。算法内部（建模/权重/约束项/优化器）解耦，便于后续精调变量定义、约束与目标函数。
description-en: Solve a 2D position (meters) for every node of a keypoint hierarchy. Area, clearance net-distance and orientation relations become differentiable energy terms, plus regularizers for parent = area-weighted child mean, circle non-overlap, and overall compactness, minimized by a deterministic Adam gradient descent. Outputs the same keypoint dict with a position {x,y} added to each node, ready to feed Keypoint Graph for metric drawing. Internals (model / weights / terms / optimizer) are decoupled for later tuning of variables, constraints and objective.
icon: 深色背景上几个大小不一的圆盘按物理关系散开并由箭头/虚线相连，整体紧凑，扁平插画风格，简洁小图标，主色2种。

inputs.name: keypoint
inputs.label: keypoint
inputs.description: 输入 keypoint 字典（{ hierarchy, relations }）。

outputs.name: keypoint
outputs.label: keypoint
outputs.description: 与输入结构一致、但每个节点新增 position {x,y}（米）的 keypoint 字典。
outputs.description-en: The same keypoint dict with position {x,y} (meters) added to each node.
